TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Anthony Albanese ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 3, Anthony Albanese, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Australia ta' misuw hya' ga Anthony Albanese, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2022 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1963 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: antńßonj alő≤anes~…ēe rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, antńßonj alő≤anes~…ēe, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw aus~…ētralia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a antńßonj alő≤anes~…ēe, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Anthony Albanese ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 3, Anthony Albanese, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Australia ta' misuw hya' ga Anthony Albanese, aring ryax tay 23 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2022 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1963 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
